name: payments-stripe
title: Stripe payments
description: Subscription checkout, a customer portal, and verified webhooks with Stripe

env.description: Secret key from the Stripe dashboard
Signing secret for the Stripe webhook endpoint
The recurring price the checkout subscribes customers to

postInstall: Run pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:migrate to create the customer table
Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and STRIPE_PRICE_ID in .env.local
Point a Stripe webhook at /api/webhooks/stripe for customer.subscription events
Render <UpgradeButton /> and <ManageBillingButton /> where you want them
